@darius4004  They were an FXP group and not an exclusive person.  The team resigned in the late 90s with the resignation letter spread across different places. It was one of the most sad things ever.

I haven't payed attention to that scene in decades.  I just looked and realized FOSI is retired so to speak.  Those were some good ol' times.
